reviews.review_text: Group of 15 and we had amazing service. We did make reservations. Avery was our server (she was amazing) and Jessie was manager (Very personable) and rolled his sleeves up to accommodate our group!. The restaurant was packed and the entire team of employees were working their butts off. We understand that with a party that big food takes time. Never been there before but highly recommend this place!
Jesse was an amazing server! Very kind, attentive, and just wonderful service overall. Very nice man.
Jesse was an amazing server, made sure our drinks were refilled when needed, just amazing costumer service and made sure we were satisfied

Group of 15 and we had amazing service. We did make reservations. Avery was our server (she was amazing) and Jessie was manager (Very personable) and rolled his sleeves up to accommodate our group!. The restaurant was packed and the entire team of employees were working their butts off. We understand that with a party that big food takes time. Never been there before but highly recommend this place!
Jesse was an amazing server! Very kind, attentive, and just wonderful service overall. Very nice man.
Jesse was an amazing server, made sure our drinks were refilled when needed, just amazing costumer service and made sure we were satisfied
Fluffy was the best server I’ve had here. Always on top of his game!😎

We had the best server last night! There is a group of us girls that come to this restaurant once a month for what we call Margarita night. Our server last night was energetic and told us what we ordered in his most authentic Spanish which sounded great to us. LOL. He was prompt and very friendly, when we asked him his name he said it was "Fluffy" and we all kind of giggled LOL.😁
Amazing food and atmosphere. Never left unhappy!! Just moved to the area and we have found our new favorite spot. Plus the mojitos are the best around!
Excellent service and great food.

(Translated by Google) The food was excellent and the service was great 😋🤤

(Original)
Excelente la comida y muy buena atención 😋🤤

Excellent food and service!  Been to many Mexican restaurants and in fact several other Los Tres Amigos.   This one way more than met our expectations.  Everything was delicious and Jesse served us and he was so friendly and amazing!
Always love coming here! Food is good and the servers are too!
I love them sm!!
love my $5 margs
Jesse was an amazing server! Very kind, attentive, and just wonderful service overall. Very nice man.
Food was great and our server was very attentive.

(Translated by Google) Our waiter Marvin was very attentive

(Original)
Nuestro mesero Marvin fue muy atento
Amazing service with a great friendly manager over all 10/10

Excellent food and service!  Been to many Mexican restaurants and in fact several other Los Tres Amigos.   This one way more than met our expectations.  Everything was delicious and Jesse served us and he was so friendly and amazing!

We had the best server last night! There is a group of us girls that come to this restaurant once a month for what we call Margarita night. Our server last night was energetic and told us what we ordered in his most authentic Spanish which sounded great to us. LOL. He was prompt and very friendly, when we asked him his name he said it was "Fluffy" and we all kind of giggled LOL.😁

Had a very great experience tonight! Actually everytime my fiance and I come in, it’s always a pleasant time. Service is great and the owner went above and beyond to make sure we were taken care of. Highly recommend.

(Translated by Google) Thanks to my colleague Fernanda, whose excellent work ethic and knowledge of the menu provided me with one of the best Mexican gastronomic experiences in Jackson, Michigan.

(Original)
Gracias a la compañera Fernanda con su excelente disposición para el trabajo, conocimiento del menú me brindó una de las mejores experiencias gastronómica mexicanas en Jackson Michigan.
Ricardo is the best!! Always a great experience! Fun, friendly atmosphere and service. Great food and ice cold beer!

Ordered nachos.  Eventually discovered nearly 1/2 inch of water in the bottom of the plate.  Chips at the bottom were completely water logged.  I asked the waiter about it.  He indifferently replied this was normal... with a straight face.  My companion's dinner was not as bad, but neither of us would ever go there again.

I placed a to go order tonight at 8:30 pm. The restaurant texted me and said my order would be ready at 9:03 pm. I sent my adult nephew in at 9pm to get the order. 20 minutes later, they still hadn't brought out the food. The guy manning the bar and the to-go orders was so busy flirting with these 2 chicks that he ignored us for 20 minutes. I even had to call out to him and wave to get him to even acknowledge my presence. When he finally came over, without the food, he gave the excuse that they were busy. I'm sorry but aside from the 2 chicks at the bar, there was only 1 other couple there. They were NOT busy. Then, they finally brought out my food and I told them I would not be back because of the crappy service. A different waiter then said, as I was leaving, "see you tomorrow" and then started laughing!
Completely unprofessional!  Don't bother coming here. There are other Mexican restaurants in Jackson that have better food and will treat you much better!
Server never came back to check on or fix order
Yuck! Cold steak tacos.. stomach was rumbling.. Do better. 1st and last time ordering from here.

The atmosphere of the place is wonderful, but that's where it ends. I had 3 tacos. Fish, chicken and beef. The beef was edible but greasy, the fish had to have been fried either much earlier in the day, or the night before as it was dry, rubbery and discolored. Not to mention void of ANY flavor whatsoever! The chicken was also dry and bland. Devoid of seasoning. NOT EVEN SALT AND PEPPER! The refried pinto beans were from a can as they had a metallic taste to them similar to sucking on a penny. The Mexican rice was partially hard. Not as in undercooked but as being leftover from a previous day  Not a single person in our 12 person enjoyed what they ordered. Unlike them, I brought these issues to light with management. I will NEVER eat there again! The quality of the food ABSOLUTELY sucks! AND was overpriced to boot! The waiter we had was nice, but only stopped by the table once after serving us that garbage. I STRONGLY recommend that if you're looking for GOOD, authentic Mexican cuisine that you avoid Tres Amigos AT ALL COST! As for the 12 of us, NONE of us will EVER eat there again.
The food was good only that the tacos don't have meat it's more tortilla than anything and the burritos had way more vegetables

Ordered nachos.  Eventually discovered nearly 1/2 inch of water in the bottom of the plate.  Chips at the bottom were completely water logged.  I asked the waiter about it.  He indifferently replied this was normal... with a straight face.  My companion's dinner was not as bad, but neither of us would ever go there again.

Not to mention void of ANY flavor whatsoever! The chicken was also dry and bland. Devoid of seasoning. NOT EVEN SALT AND PEPPER! The refried pinto beans were from a can as they had a metallic taste to them similar to sucking on a penny. The Mexican rice was partially hard. Not as in undercooked but as being leftover from a previous day  Not a single person in our 12 person enjoyed what they ordered. Unlike them, I brought these issues to light with management. I will NEVER eat there again! The quality of the food ABSOLUTELY sucks! AND was overpriced to boot! The waiter we had was nice, but only stopped by the table once after serving us that garbage. I STRONGLY recommend that if you're looking for GOOD, authentic Mexican cuisine that you avoid Tres Amigos AT ALL COST! As for the 12 of us, NONE of us will EVER eat there again.

I have never dined in at this location so I can’t speak from that point of view, but I have ordered takeout from them four times now for my family of five and the last three times the takeout order has been missing an entree and very little has been offered to compensate me for this. I will not dining in or ordering takeout from this location ever again.

I placed a to go order tonight at 8:30 pm. The restaurant texted me and said my order would be ready at 9:03 pm. I sent my adult nephew in at 9pm to get the order. 20 minutes later, they still hadn't brought out the food. The guy manning the bar and the to-go orders was so busy flirting with these 2 chicks that he ignored us for 20 minutes. I even had to call out to him and wave to get him to even acknowledge my presence. When he finally came over, without the food, he gave the excuse that they were busy. I'm sorry but aside from the 2 chicks at the bar, there was only 1 other couple there. They were NOT busy. Then, they finally brought out my food and I told them I would not be back because of the crappy service. A different waiter then said, as I was leaving, "see you tomorrow" and then started laughing!
Completely unprofessional!  Don't bother coming here. There are other Mexican restaurants in Jackson that have better food and will treat you much better!

It is VERY LOUD. I'm saying this being a person that is hard of hearing. They have people packed together so much that you can't hear anything because everything is so loud and you're literally bumping elbows with other people. I could -almost- get past that if it wasn't for the fact that when I walked into the bathroom, I walked into a LAKE of HUMAN URINE. At first, I thought they had just mopped it, but no. I nearly slipped and fell into a lake of urine in the bathroom. It got on my pants so it completely ruined me being there for my mother's 70th birthday. I  asked to talk to the owner so the hostess went and retrieved him, but due to the noise, I couldn't understand anything he was saying. After a few minutes of reiterating that the bathroom was a literal cesspool, I left.

I definitely do not recommend

I don’t understand—if you can’t handle the orders you already have, why take more? Why be greedy?

You took my order 40 minutes ago and told me it would be ready in 40 minutes. I arrived, and it still wasn’t ready. I stood there waiting another 30 minutes in front of the counter.

Then you ask why I’m being rude. Am I rude, or are you? You accepted my order but couldn’t handle it. Why keep taking more orders if you can’t manage them?

I was watching the whole time—other people came in, got their food, and left. But my order, which was placed earlier, still wasn’t ready.

That’s not fair, and it’s frustrating.

I placed a to go order tonight at 8:30 pm. The restaurant texted me and said my order would be ready at 9:03 pm. I sent my adult nephew in at 9pm to get the order. 20 minutes later, they still hadn't brought out the food. The guy manning the bar and the to-go orders was so busy flirting with these 2 chicks that he ignored us for 20 minutes. I even had to call out to him and wave to get him to even acknowledge my presence. When he finally came over, without the food, he gave the excuse that they were busy. I  asked to talk to the owner so the hostess went and retrieved him, but due to the noise, I couldn't understand anything he was saying. After a few minutes of reiterating that the bathroom was a literal cesspool, I left.

I definitely do not recommend

The service was terrible honestly. I took my girlfriend and daughter here for lunch  today, Saturday may 12th, and needless to say they didnt care about us at all. I mean from getting my order wrong, failing to refill our salsa and chips, to us having to remind MULTIPLE waiters for straws (which they carry in their aprons), 2 lemons and a booster seat for my daughter. I had to walk to the bar to remind them. They even went as far as to bring me my beer and not my daughter or girlfriends drinks, in which we had to remind them another 3 times for those as well. We were labeled being black and because of that, the level of service was poor, compared to if I were Hispanic or white. **HUGE DISCLAIMER** They treat you differently here if you aren't either of the two and it shows. This in turn speaks VOLUMES on the management as well to employ people of this caliber that are so worried about a tip they fail to do their job to recieve one, because of the fact you aren't Hispanic or white. If i weren't a different person I would have left on the bill. I WILL NEVER BRING MY FAMILY BACK TO THE HOLT LOS TRES AMIGOS EVER AGAIN!!

Absolutely terrible experience at the Owosso, MI Los Tres Amigos location. Our group of 26 waited nearly 2 hours with very little service, barely any communication, and long stretches without even water refills. We were patient and understanding the entire time, but after asking if anything could be done on the bill due to the experience, the owner, Jesse, came out yelling and cursing at our group instead of trying to resolve the situation professionally.

I simply asked if he could do better than 15% off considering how poorly everything was handled, and he responded by escalating the situation and calling the police. I have never experienced an owner speak to customers that way in my life.

I understand restaurants get busy, but there is absolutely no excuse for treating customers with hostility and disrespect. Extremely disappointing experience and not somewhere I would recommend after the way we were treated.

I met my parents for dinner here today, and was really shocked to hear that, while waiting for a table, my 70-something year old dad sat on the metal bench outside of the restaurant and the leg collapsed! The legs were rusted and instable- my dad is not overweight by any means. He fell backward and hit the back of his head against the stone wall of the restaurant, and scraped up his back significantly as well. According to my parents, the staff did not seem concerned that this had happened. The actual meal was okay and our server was great, but this really colored our experience and I know my Dad’s back and head still hurt. When we left the restaurant, the bench was still broken, the other next to it just as rusted and (in my opinion) unsafe.

I would have appreciated an obvious attempt to prevent this from happening again (a sign on the benches, caution cone, anything) and a sincere apology for the restaurant’s failure to remove or notice the instability of the benches by their front door. I am just glad my dad wasn’t seriously injured.

Disappointed with this place. I ordered a carne asada to go, and when I got home, the salad was missing. The meat had no flavor, and the fried black beans didn’t look good at all. After this experience, I won’t be coming back.

I met my parents for dinner here today, and was really shocked to hear that, while waiting for a table, my 70-something year old dad sat on the metal bench outside of the restaurant and the leg collapsed! I will NEVER eat there again! The quality of the food ABSOLUTELY sucks! AND was overpriced to boot! The waiter we had was nice, but only stopped by the table once after serving us that garbage. I STRONGLY recommend that if you're looking for GOOD, authentic Mexican cuisine that you avoid Tres Amigos AT ALL COST! As for the 12 of us, NONE of us will EVER eat there again.

Hello I wanted to reach out about a situation that I had with me and my daughter when I dined in for dinner. I was treated poorly and she was as well and the manager made very racial remarks and slurs towards us and was very unprofessional and rude. It was uncalled for and not okay to be treated that way and I will not be back to eat there or recommend this restaurant to any friends or family members. The manager that was working ant the booth in the front of the restaurant that came to my table asked me for my drivers license because he didn’t think I was a mother because I wanted a free dessert for Mother’s Day. He was making comments about me not being my daughter’s Mother. For some reason he didn’t believe that I was her Mother. It wasn’t that serious over getting a free dessert. They had a special going on for Mother’s day where you can get a free dessert. I am white and she is black and white. I called and made a complaint about it and the same guy that I had the issue with answered the phone and I told him the situation and what happened. He said that would never happen here because they’re Mexican people that work there at the restaurant. I told him that it did happen and it can happen to anyone at anytime regardless of race. I told him that was very disrespectful and it shouldn’t have happened in the first place. I don’t understand why I would be asked for my drivers license if I’m not buying alcohol in the first place. That has nothing to do with me getting a free dessert. An id isn’t going to prove anything about me being a Mother. I am very frustrated this happened and that the restaurant treats other people differently because of someone’s race. That is never okay and Is uncalled for and out of line. This isn’t the first time I have had an incident with this manager. He has been very rude and disrespectful to me on several occasions also when getting to go orders. I have had order messed up and I was blamed for their mistakes. I think he should be disciplined and fired for his poor behavior and customer service as well as being prejudice and making racial slurs and remarks. He is a tall guy that is Mexican and I don’t recall his name but he is very serious all the time and not friendly
at all.  I should have not had to deal with this situation or my daughter what so ever. I will never come back here ever again.

I placed a to go order tonight at 8:30 pm. The restaurant texted me and said my order would be ready at 9:03 pm. I sent my adult nephew in at 9pm to get the order. 20 minutes later, they still hadn't brought out the food. The guy manning the bar and the to-go orders was so busy flirting with these 2 chicks that he ignored us for 20 minutes. I even had to call out to him and wave to get him to even acknowledge my presence. When he finally came over, without the food, he gave the excuse that they were busy. I'm sorry but aside from the 2 chicks at the bar, there was only 1 other couple there. They were NOT busy. Then, they finally brought out my food and I told them I would not be back because of the crappy service. A different waiter then said, as I was leaving, "see you tomorrow" and then started laughing!
Completely unprofessional!  Don't bother coming here. There are other Mexican restaurants in Jackson that have better food and will treat you much better!

If you go there intending to enjoy a margarita, expect them to not fill it all the way up and they will add gratuity on it as well, no matter what. Asked them to fill it up all the way and they said no.

Food was great service was great had an amazing mother's day dinner here !!!!
Food was amazing, & the service was top notch, Mariel took great care of us.

Food was great will
Come again
Nery was amazing!! The food and drinks was so delicious, would come back!
Our server Nery was very generous. We definitely will be coming back!
Atmosphere was very lively. Our server Nery was attentive and outright amazing. Will be coming back again!!
Marvel was awesome.
Great food and service! I love the tacos so much and had a great time, our server Marvel did a great job
Great food and service! I love the tacos so much and had a great time, our server Marvel did a great job
Olivia was awesome! Food was great, as always. But Olivia was very attentive and enjoyable!

Olivia was fantastic. She managed a very large party with ease and grace. We had several different requests and she fulfilled them without a problem! I wish the food was a little better but I know to get the street tacos next time.
Delicious food every time I come here. It is always super clean and a great staff! Our server Olivia was fantastic, super attentive and friendly!

This was our first experience here, & it was wonderful. Not too busy, the dining room is clean and fun to look at.. Our server Fatima, was amazing. She let us take our time with the HUGE menu, was quick to ask us if we wanted a drink from the bar & got them while we browsed the options for food. 10/10 experience for a friday night dinner with my husband.
This is our go to spot for Mexican. My fiance gets the birria tacos and he says they're the best! I come for the shrimp fajitas and margaritas :) If you haven't tried it, I highly recommend going.

This was our first time in Chicago fans we are here for 3 days. We didn’t know where to eat we tried a decent place for lunch but for dinner we decided to come try Casa Tequila. I can honestly say we hit the jackpot. The atmosphere food and service are excellent. We were lucky enough that the bartender Tony was also our server. He treated us great !!!!! He took the time to explain the menu and all the specials. But what I enjoyed the most was that he introduced me to a whole new cocktail experience. We are going to be back tomorrow and the next day. Highly recommended this place you won’t be disappointed.
Jorge was amazing and a hard worker he was doing most of the work and still making good timing
Jorge was great. Attentive and funny!
Jorge was amazing! Great service

My mom and I have been coming to eat here for the past 7 years and the food NEVER disappoints. During our most recent visit, we received incredible service by our waitress Autumn who checked in on us multiple times throughout our dinner and was very kind and friendly.

My mom and I have been coming to eat here for the past 7 years and the food NEVER disappoints. During our most recent visit, we received incredible service by our waitress Autumn who checked in on us multiple times throughout our dinner and was very kind and friendly.
Autumn was our server and she was so wonderful. So sweet and attentive. It was so busy too. Literally perfect service.
Always a solid meal from here. Francisco was our waiter and was awesome!
Francisco was great. This is the best location! Canton, MI!
Francisco was amazing in the midst of Cinco de Mayo chaos 😊
Everything was amazing. The food was great and Zach was a wonderful server. Great experience all the way around.
Everything was amazing from the service to the food I couldn’t have asked for a better dinner tonight.
Everything was amazing from the moment we walked in. You have to try the birria tacos.

First time at Los Tres Amigos and I will say that I have found my new favorite Mexican restaurant in the local area. Jesse was our server and owner of the establishment and he was very welcoming. He answered all our questions and took time to get to know us on a little bit of a personal level. Great place to stop if you are ever in the area.
Jesse was great! Very friendly and provided great service.
Jesse was great, definitely will be coming back and requesting him soon!!
We went for Taco Tuesday, 3 of us.  They cancelled 2.00 tacos on cinco demio and it cost me &75.00 plus tip.  I will not be going back there.  Not worth it.
Yuck! Cold steak tacos.. stomach was rumbling.. Do better. 1st and last time ordering from here.

The beef was edible but greasy, the fish had to have been fried either much earlier in the day, or the night before as it was dry, rubbery and discolored. Not to mention void of ANY flavor whatsoever! The chicken was also dry and bland. Devoid of seasoning. NOT EVEN SALT AND PEPPER! The refried pinto beans were from a can as they had a metallic taste to them similar to sucking on a penny. The Mexican rice was partially hard. Not as in undercooked but as being leftover from a previous day  Not a single person in our 12 person enjoyed what they ordered. Unlike them, I brought these issues to light with management. I will NEVER eat there again! The quality of the food ABSOLUTELY sucks! AND was overpriced to boot! The waiter we had was nice, but only stopped by the table once after serving us that garbage. I STRONGLY recommend that if you're looking for GOOD, authentic Mexican cuisine that you avoid Tres Amigos AT ALL COST! As for the 12 of us, NONE of us will EVER eat there again.

We had the best server last night! There is a group of us girls that come to this restaurant once a month for what we call Margarita night. Our server last night was energetic and told us what we ordered in his most authentic Spanish which sounded great to us. LOL. He was prompt and very friendly, when we asked him his name he said it was "Fluffy" and we all kind of giggled LOL.😁
They have a nice outdoor seating area, a good margarita and good food. I'd go back again.

Chips were actually good, though they were slightly overdone.
Was excited to see I could order chimichangas a la cart; they are my favorite.
However it was disappointing when they arrived and the outer "crispy shell" was so well done it completely shattered 🥺 meat was meh... (Steak always) Our server was so great - so that helped with the experience.
My margarita was fantastic though. I got a watermelon on the rocks with a sugar rim. Would return for the margarita and the service, Never for the food.

Service and atmosphere was great and waiting for seating. Food portions were on the small side for the price. several of us had room temp to slightly warm sides. (Rice and beans). Maybe they had an off day?
Over priced food, no bueno.

Always has the best fresh ingredients. Staff is always respectful and make you feel like you're family. Food is always on point for the price. Can't say the same for the other location or rival restaurants.

I’ve always loved your food and margaritas for many years.   However I went last week and the margarita was just weird obviously a change in recipe. I read online that tequila was changed to peach schnapps.  It was too sweet and just gross. I will give it one more try but if it’s the same we are out.  Very disappointed.
Ivan and Alex were right there when we needed them. They were right there when we needed drink refills. Always a great time at Los Tres in Holt!!  Blended Margaritas are amazing.
Great happy hour drinks ($4.99 margaritas) and $1.99 tacos on Taco Tuesday. Most tacos at this price, not just the basic ground beef tacos.

We had Fluffy as our server last night and he was excellent! He greeted and seated us quickly along with menus and our chips & salsa. He was fluent in his Spanish which was perfect since my friend couldn’t pronounce what she was ordering! Fluffy smiled, made eye contact and knew when to chat and when to let us eat. I hope he’s our server next time!

Chips were actually good, though they were slightly overdone.
Was excited to see I could order chimichangas a la cart; they are my favorite.
However it was disappointing when they arrived and the outer "crispy shell" was so well done it completely shattered 🥺 meat was meh... (Steak always) Our server was so great - so that helped with the experience.
My margarita was fantastic though. I got a watermelon on the rocks with a sugar rim. Would return for the margarita and the service, Never for the food.

Food was served quickly and hot. Our server I think went on a half hour break and forgot to tell us. We got our drinks about 10 minutes after we ordered them, and then we were totally forgotten about. Finally, I flagged a manager down who took our order. Server finally reappeared after that. My husband asked for more chips and another beer, which he never got. I think we would rather keep going to the Holt location.

We had Fluffy as our server last night and he was excellent! He greeted and seated us quickly along with menus and our chips & salsa. He was fluent in his Spanish which was perfect since my friend couldn’t pronounce what she was ordering! Fluffy smiled, made eye contact and knew when to chat and when to let us eat. I hope he’s our server next time!

(Translated by Google) Everything was excellent, except for one change I didn't like: they removed the monkey sauce from the surf and lurf sushi, and now they charge you for it!

(Original)
Todo excelente, pero solo un cambio no me gustó , y fue que al shushi surf and lurf le quitaron la salsa de los monkeys , y ahora te la cobran !

There are plenty of places to get good Mexican food in this part of Detroit, but if you want seafood, this is the place.

There is a large parking area behind the restaurant, which has a bright blue, colorful sign. Great logo, it would look good on a hat.

Right away you know something is different when instead of getting a dish of salsa with a chip basket you get a dish of diced tomatoes, onions, cilantro with surimi. They let you know right away, this is a sea food place (although they do have other options).

Very well stocked bar, and lots of drink options. Their selections of Micheladas is astounding, featuring some huge options packed with shrimp, crab, etc.

I recommend either looking at the menu ahead of time, or leaving yourself some extra time. It is large, and has many tempting options.

We tried something familiar, Camarones Mexicana (shrimp with tomatoes, onions and just a few jalapeños) and something new to us, a bed of rice with a spicy stew of shrimp, octopus and surimi (we were warned it was spicy, but the balance of heat and flavor was perfect). Everything was excellent.

This is a great place to try an aspect of Mexican cuisine that is often under represented in many restaurants, stop in and try something, you might get a new favorite.
Live laugh love los tres! Burrito mondays are the best!

Honestly, the food is decent. Portions are trash, I bought the Big Amigo burrito and it was mostly sour cream and lettuce with a few pieces of steak.  Hardly any beans and no rice.  My family all ordered the Verde burritos and they were pretty small as well. Acapulco Grill in Frandpr is a far better choice.

My wife and I come here weekly, we love the burrito amigos, chimichangas, and honestly so many other things here. Today we had Alexis as our server, and she was excellent. We’ve had many others, but today we just thought it would be worth leaving the review. Best Mexican food in greater Lansing area that I have currently had!
